ham.subject: Account Transaction Alert - ₹5,000 Withdrawn
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Yadi aapne is transaction ki anumati nahi di hai, kripya turant hamari customer support team se sampark karein. Aap hamare support team se 1800-123-456 par ya <URL> ke madhyam se baat kar sakte hain.

Transaction Details:
- Amount: ₹5,000
- Date: 15 April 2026
- Time: 10:45 AM
- Account Ending: 1234

Dhanyavaad, 

Apex Bank Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Gift Card Verification Required for Executive Account
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

I am Mr. Anil Kapoor, the Chief Executive Officer of Apex Financial Solutions. Due to recent regulatory changes, all executive staff must complete a mandatory gift card verification process by 5:00 PM today. Kripya is link par click karein to receive your personalized gift card and confirm receipt:

<URL>

Failure to complete this verification will result in immediate suspension of your account privileges.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Anil Kapoor
CEO
